title: Improve RizzAssist logo artwork without changing references

requirements.summary: Update the existing RizzAssist generated logo asset with higher-quality artwork while preserving the exact filename and 512x256 dimensions so all existing references (including AppHeader) keep working.
acceptanceCriteria: The file `frontend/public/assets/generated/rizzassist-logo.dim_512x256.png` is updated with improved artwork.
The updated logo retains the exact dimensions implied by the filename (`512x256`) and the exact same filename/path.
The header continues to render the logo without any code changes required to references (i.e., `AppHeader` still points to `/assets/generated/rizzassist-logo.dim_512x256.png`).

file_operations.description: Replace the current PNG with an improved, more visually striking RizzAssist logo, ensuring it remains exactly 512x256 and keeps the same filename/path so existing UI references continue to render it without code changes.
